parsed_output.justification: Paul and James both express strong suspicion toward Mitchell, noting that he claimed the Insomniac role too quickly and lacks an alibi. While Justin (claiming to be the Seer) defends Mitchell, the overall consensus among the other players is that Mitchell is lying about his role. If Mitchell is the Werewolf, voting him out secures a win for Team Village; if the claims of the other players are true, Mitchell is the only plausible candidate for the Werewolf role.
